title: Melted Venezuelan Cherry Bake
description: A buttery, gooey, low‑fat Venezuelan cherry bake cooked in a cozy papillote for a comforting, melt‑in‑your-mouth dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, combine the cherries, honey, corn syrup, sugar, vanilla, salt, and cinnamon and stir gently.
In a separate bowl, whisk the flour and egg until smooth, then add the milk and melted butter and stir until just combined.
Pour the wet batter over the cherry mixture in a parchment lined baking dish, spreading evenly.
Fold parchment paper into a papillote and seal the edges tightly to trap steam.
Place the parchment packet on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes until golden brown and set.
Remove from the oven and carefully cut open the packet to release the steam before serving.
Serve the warm, gooey bake immediately, optionally dusted with powdered sugar.
